刘策穿越到东汉末年，成为家道中落的汉室宗亲，开局获得霸王传承，随后去洛阳买个太守当，先后招揽典韦、赵云、关羽、张飞，并结拜为兄弟。
十几章后，陆续得到天可汗模板，秦琼、程咬金、三千玄甲铁骑。
为了活下去，为了老刘家，为了乱世中的美女，买了个涿郡太守，平定黄巾之乱，封冠军侯，拜骠骑将军，让皇帝下旨替刘策招揽文臣武将，后又平定乌桓、定高句丽、击溃鲜卑，封狼居胥，饮马瀚海，被刘宏封王。
待刘宏死后，刘策携数万精锐南下，马踏中原，一统江山，三造大汉。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/49448021b0e7993df05d08f0e5918d43","author":"青城门的空深彼方","author_id":"","book_id":"7568826799472249918","book_name":"三国：霸王传承，天可汗模板","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568826836625408574","read_count":"60461","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"790501"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"381","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3ea976e59633ff4020376b4a06f810b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445620&x-signature=4Mf7ZrRCdI6Dn%2FeWzFOAOZxzHS0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109627682426","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4559,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20883,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":18495},"us 刘策穿越到东汉末年，成为家道中落的汉室宗亲，开局获得霸王传承，随后去洛阳买个太守当，先后招揽典韦、赵云、关羽、张飞，并结拜为兄弟。
十几章后，陆续得到天可汗模板，秦琼、程咬金、三千玄甲铁骑。
为了活下去，为了老刘家，为了乱世中的美女，买了个涿郡太守，平定黄巾之乱，封冠军侯，拜骠骑将军，让皇帝下旨替刘策招揽文臣武将，后又平定乌桓、定高句丽、击溃鲜卑，封狼居胥，饮马瀚海，被刘宏封王。
